Building: # Source: official Whiteout Survival Wiki (Century Games), cross-checked vs Lobster community compilation. Verified June 2026.
# Each amount = tier total with sub-level breakdown in parentheses. Every tier = 5 upgrade steps; e.g. '900 (4x200 + 100)' = four sub-levels of 200 plus a 100 final step.
# All three troop camps (Infantry, Lancer, Marksman) share one cost track - budget the listed amount per camp, three times.

# War Academy has no paid FC1 (it unlocks free at Furnace FC1); its FC8 FC/RFC are normalized to the camp track (wiki showed 540/45, a likely typo). Its Wood/Meat/Coal/Iron and build times are its own.
# Resource/time values are base (no construction-speed buffs). Minor per-cell wiki typos exist (Embassy iron at a couple of steps; Camp FC1-2 meat) and do not affect tier totals materially.
# Command Centre and Infirmary FC costs are not included in this file.
